revision.comment: categorization (see also [[WP:CAT#]]) (via [[WP:JWB]])
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kampaku | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | title = [[Sesshō and Kampaku|''Kampaku'']] | image =
| above =
|group1 = [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]] |list1 = * [[:en:Fujiwara no Mototsune|Fujiwara no Mototsune]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Tadahira|Fujiwara no Tadahira]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Saneyori|Fujiwara no Saneyori]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Kanemichi|Fujiwara no Kanemichi]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Yoritada|Fujiwara no Yoritada]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Kaneie|Fujiwara no Kaneie]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Michitaka|Fujiwara no Michitaka]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Michikane|Fujiwara no Michikane]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Yorimichi|Fujiwara no Yorimichi]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Norimichi|Fujiwara no Norimichi]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Morozane|Fujiwara no Morozane]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Moromichi|Fujiwara no Moromichi]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Tadazane|Fujiwara no Tadazane]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Tadamichi|Fujiwara no Tadamichi]] * [[:en:Konoe Motozane|Konoe Motozane]] * [[:en:Fujiwara no Motofusa|Fujiwara no Motofusa]] * [[:en:Konoe Motomichi|Konoe Motomichi]]
|group2 = [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura period]] |list2 = * [[:en:Kujō Kanezane|Kujō Kanezane]] * [[:en:Konoe Motomichi|Konoe Motomichi]] * [[:en:Konoe Iezane|Konoe Iezane]] * [[:en:Kujō Michiie|Kujō Michiie]] * [[:en:Konoe Kanetsune|Konoe Kanetsune]] * [[:en:Nijō Yoshizane|Nijō Yoshizane]] * [[:en:Ichijō Sanetsune|Ichijō Sanetsune]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Kanehira|Takatsukasa Kanehira]] * [[:en:Nijō Yoshizane|Nijō Yoshizane]] * [[:en:Ichijō Sanetsune|Ichijō Sanetsune]] * [[:en:Konoe Motohira|Konoe Motohira]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Mototada|Takatsukasa Mototada]] * [[:en:Kujō Tadaie|Kujō Tadaie]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Kanehira|Takatsukasa Kanehira]] * [[:en:Nijō Morotada|Nijō Morotada]] * [[:en:Konoe Iemoto|Konoe Iemoto]] * [[:en:Kujō Tadanori|Kujō Tadanori]] * [[:en:Konoe Iemoto|Konoe Iemoto]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Kanetada|Takatsukasa Kanetada]] * [[:en:Nijō Kanemoto|Nijō Kanemoto]] * [[:en:Kujō Moronori|Kujō Moronori]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Fuyuhira|Takatsukasa Fuyuhira]] * [[:en:Konoe Iehira|Konoe Iehira]] * [[:en:Nijō Michihira|Nijō Michihira]] * [[:en:Ichijō Uchitsune|Ichijō Uchitsune]] * [[:en:Kujō Fusazane|Kujō Fusazane]] * [[:en:Konoe Tsunetada|Konoe Tsunetada]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Fuyunori|Takatsukasa Fuyunori]]
|group3 = [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] |list3 = {{Navbox|child |groupstyle=text-align:center; |group1=Southern Court |list1= * [[Nijō Moromoto]] * [[Konoe Tsuneie]] * [[Nijō Norimoto]] * [[Nijō Noriyori]] * [[Nijō Fuyuzane]] * Konoe-tono {{small|(name unknown)}}
|group2=Northern Court |list2= * [[:en:Konoe Tsunetada|Konoe Tsunetada]] * [[:en:Konoe Mototsugu|Konoe Mototsugu]] * [[:en:Ichijō Tsunemichi|Ichijō Tsunemichi]] * [[:en:Kujō Michinori|Kujō Michinori]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Morohira|Takatsukasa Morohira]] * [[:en:Nijō Yoshimoto|Nijō Yoshimoto]] * [[:en:Kujō Tsunenori|Kujō Tsunenori]] * [[:en:Konoe Michitsugu|Konoe Michitsugu]] * [[:en:Nijō Yoshimoto|Nijō Yoshimoto]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Fuyumichi|Takatsukasa Fuyumichi]] * [[:en:Nijō Moroyoshi|Nijō Moroyoshi]] * [[:en:Kujō Tadamoto|Kujō Tadamoto]] * [[:en:Nijō Morotsugu|Nijō Morotsugu]] * [[:en:Nijō Yoshimoto|Nijō Yoshimoto]] * [[:en:Nijō Morotsugu|Nijō Morotsugu]]
}}
|group4 = [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] |list4 = * [[:en:Ichijō Tsunetsugu|Ichijō Tsunetsugu]] * [[:en:Nijō Morotsugu|Nijō Morotsugu]] * [[:en:Konoe Tadatsugu|Konoe Tadatsugu]] * [[:en:Nijō Mitsumoto|Nijō Mitsumoto]] * [[:en:Kujō Mitsuie|Kujō Mitsuie]] * [[:en:Nijō Mochimoto|Nijō Mochimoto]] * [[:en:Konoe Fusatsugu|Konoe Fusatsugu]] * [[:en:Ichijō Kaneyoshi|Ichijō Kaneyoshi]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Fusahira|Takatsukasa Fusahira]] * [[:en:Nijō Mochimichi|Nijō Mochimichi]] * [[:en:Ichijō Norifusa|Ichijō Norifusa]] * [[:en:Nijō Masatsugu|Nijō Masatsugu]] * [[:en:Kujō Masamoto|Kujō Masamoto]] * [[:en:Konoe Masaie|Konoe Masaie]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Masahira|Takatsukasa Masahira]] * [[:en:Kujō Masatada|Kujō Masatada]] * [[:en:Ichijō Fuyuyoshi|Ichijō Fuyuyoshi]] * [[:en:Konoe Hisamichi|Konoe Hisamichi]]
|group5 = [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] |list5 = * [[:en:Nijō Hisamoto|Nijō Hisamoto]] * [[:en:Ichijō Fuyuyoshi|Ichijō Fuyuyoshi]] * [[:en:Kujō Hisatsune|Kujō Hisatsune]] * [[:en:Konoe Hisamichi|Konoe Hisamichi]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Kanesuke|Takatsukasa Kanesuke]] * [[:en:Nijō Korefusa|Nijō Korefusa]] * [[:en:Konoe Taneie|Konoe Taneie]] * [[:en:Kujō Tanemichi|Kujō Tanemichi]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Tadafuyu|Takatsukasa Tadafuyu]] * [[:en:Ichijō Fusamichi|Ichijō Fusamichi]] * [[:en:Nijō Haruyoshi|Nijō Haruyoshi]] * [[:en:Ichijō Kanefuyu|Ichijō Kanefuyu]] * [[:en:Konoe Sakihisa|Konoe Sakihisa]]
|group6 = [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama period]] |list6 = * [[:en:Nijō Haruyoshi|Nijō Haruyoshi]] * [[:en:Kujō Kanetaka|Kujō Kanetaka]] * [[:en:Ichijō Uchimoto|Ichijō Uchimoto]] * [[:en:Nijō Akizane|Nijō Akizane]] * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * [[:en:Toyotomi Hidetsugu|Toyotomi Hidetsugu]]
|group7 = [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]] |list7 = * [[:en:Kujō Kanetaka|Kujō Kanetaka]] * [[:en:Konoe Nobutada|Konoe Nobutada]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Nobufusa|Takatsukasa Nobufusa]] * [[:en:Kujō Yukiie|Kujō Yukiie]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Nobuhisa|Takatsukasa Nobuhisa]] * [[:en:Nijō Akizane|Nijō Akizane]] * [[:en:Kujō Yukiie|Kujō Yukiie]] * [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] * [[:en:Ichijō Akiyoshi|Ichijō Akiyoshi]] * [[:en:Konoe Hisatsugu|Konoe Hisatsugu]] * [[:en:Nijō Mitsuhira|Nijō Mitsuhira]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Fusasuke|Takatsukasa Fusasuke]] * [[:en:Ichijō Kaneteru|Ichijō Kaneteru]] * [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Kanehiro|Takatsukasa Kanehiro]] * [[:en:Konoe Iehiro|Konoe Iehiro]] * [[:en:Kujō Sukezane|Kujō Sukezane]] * [[:en:Nijō Tsunahira|Nijō Tsunahira]] * [[:en:Konoe Iehisa|Konoe Iehisa]] * [[:en:Nijō Yoshitada|Nijō Yoshitada]] * [[:en:Ichijō Kaneka|Ichijō Kaneka]] * [[:en:Ichijō Michika|Ichijō Michika]] * [[:en:Konoe Uchisaki|Konoe Uchisaki]] * [[:en:Kujō Naozane|Kujō Naozane]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Sukehira|Takatsukasa Sukehira]] * [[:en:Ichijō Teruyoshi|Ichijō Teruyoshi]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Masahiro|Takatsukasa Masahiro]] * [[:en:Ichijō Tadayoshi|Ichijō Tadayoshi]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Masamichi|Takatsukasa Masamichi]] * [[:en:Kujō Hisatada|Kujō Hisatada]] * [[:en:Konoe Tadahiro|Konoe Tadahiro]] * [[:en:Takatsukasa Sukehiro|Takatsukasa Sukehiro]] * [[:en:Nijō Nariyuki|Nijō Nariyuki]]
|below =
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option |statename=optional |default=collapsed}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
